retrievalTimeoutSeconds.label: Retrieval Timeout (seconds)
retrievalTimeoutSeconds.help: How long the subagent has to complete the search

workspaceDir.label: Workspace Directory
workspaceDir.help: Clean directory the subagent works in; recreated on plugin load

retrievalModel.label: Retrieval Model
retrievalModel.help: Model for the retrieval subagent (v2+); leave blank for gateway default

retrievalProvider.label: Retrieval Provider
retrievalProvider.help: Provider for the retrieval subagent (v2+); leave blank for gateway default

embeddingUrl.label: Embedding URL (v2+)
embeddingUrl.help: Local llama-server URL for embeddings (default: http://127.0.0.1:8001)

workspaceDir.description: Workspace directory for subagent; recreated on plugin load

retrievalModel.description: Model for the retrieval subagent (v2+). Omit to use gateway default.

retrievalProvider.description: Provider for the retrieval subagent (v2+). Omit to use gateway default.

embeddingUrl.description: Local llama-server URL for embedding generation (v2+). Default: http://127.0.0.1:8001
